name: Belfast City Park
description: Come play pickleball at Belfast City Park in Belfast, ME! There are 4 outdoor acrylic courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include food, restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. The courts are free.

name: Lincolnville Center School
description: Come play pickleball at Lincolnville Center School in Lincolnville, ME! There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The courts are free. Players have access to restrooms and water.

name: Point Lookout Resort
description: Come play pickleball at Point Lookout Resort in Northport, ME! There are 4 outdoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. Players have access to restrooms, water, wheelchair accessibility, and lights. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Waldo County YMCA
description: Waldo County YMCA is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Belfast, ME. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. Reservations are available.
